title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Future Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Future Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Future Retail:
Future Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Future Retail!
